ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Shadcn has no ordinary provider-neutral message primitive with a documented role, delivery, long-content, and enhancement-off contract.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: A semantic article can add an explicit text-backed role and delivery rail without changing provider-neutral content or actions.

visualSignature.summary: Literal Canvas, Ink structure, Green and Violet role signals, strong type, bounded corners, logical layout and two-layer focus identify the Mergora family.

optionalEnhancements.summary: showRoleContext independently adds localized role and delivery text.

disabledBehavior.behavior: The native article and content remain unchanged.
disabledBehavior.events: No enhancement event or renderer runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No enhancement text or relationship enters the accessibility tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Focused source and automated evidence covers article semantics, unsafe-content boundaries, enhancement removal, narrow layout, RTL and forced colors; the full manual matrix is not recorded.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused Storybook browser evidence verifies this item's enhancement isolation and primary semantic or interaction path; the family suite also checks runtime failures, axe, narrow RTL structure, forced colors, reduced motion, and touch where applicable.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Lifecycle, browser, visual, current manual accessibility, public dogfooding and Passport approval remain open.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Deterministic delivery parity is verified, but the remaining interaction, lifecycle, browser, accessibility, scale, security, or release evidence recorded for this item is still insufficient for promotion.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Shadcn has no ordinary message list that owns virtualization, user-respecting follow-output, scroll recovery, and throttled announcements.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Optional fixed-row virtualization, follow-output, resume control, and debounced announcements remain independently selectable.

visualSignature.summary: A literal-white measured viewport, Ink rule, compact action Green, Violet focus, restrained corners and preference fallbacks use the shared Mergora workbench language.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Virtualization, follow-output, resume UI and new-message announcements are four explicit off-by-default controls.

api.enableWhen: Each prop is set independently to a non-false value.

disabledBehavior.ui: No virtual window, resume button, or live region is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: All messages remain in a normal ordered list and user scrolling is native.
disabledBehavior.events: No scroll-policy callback, timer, or announcement formatter runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No virtual position metadata or live-region output enters the tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Source and focused browser tests cover ordered-list semantics, virtual position metadata, exact enhancement removal, an emulated touch follow-control path, reduced-motion behavior, and axe; manual virtualized screen-reader review is missing.

interactionEvidence.summary: Browser evidence covers basic/recommended isolation, virtual windows, user-scroll pause, a coarse-pointer tap to resume follow-output, and reduced-motion behavior; the full large-data, cross-browser, and real-device matrix is not recorded.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Large-data performance, browsers, manual assistive technology, lifecycle and Passport evidence remain open.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Risk Class 3 release and evidence gates remain incomplete.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: An ordinary Shadcn composition combines Textarea and Button but does not provide this integrated native form, IME, attachment, offline, stop, and reset contract.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Native serialization and reset remain baseline while IME-safe shortcuts, attachments, removal, and a character budget are independently optional.

visualSignature.summary: Strong field labels, literal-white inputs, Ink rules, stable status surfaces, Action Green, Violet focus and restrained radii extend shared field patterns.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Submit shortcut, attachment surface, removal callback, and budget output are independent component-specific props.

api.enableWhen: Each prop is explicitly enabled independently.

disabledBehavior.ui: No shortcut hint, attachment list/removal action, or budget output is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Enter remains multiline and the native form remains usable.
disabledBehavior.events: No shortcut interception or attachment callback runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No enhancement controls, descriptions, or outputs enter the tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Focused tests cover visible label, native form data, IME, enhancement removal, offline/error and semantic CSS; mobile keyboard and manual AT evidence remain missing.

interactionEvidence.summary: Unit and browser stories cover core shortcuts and optional surfaces; complete reset, autofill, touch, browser and error-recovery matrices remain incomplete.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Form lifecycle, browsers, mobile input, manual AT and Passport gates remain open.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Risk Class 3 release, lifecycle and manual evidence is incomplete.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Shadcn has no ordinary prompt-suggestion primitive that atomically aligns action/listbox semantics, roving keyboard behavior, localization, and controlled state.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: The default stays native action buttons while selectionMode atomically adds controlled selection, listbox semantics and roving keyboard focus.

visualSignature.summary: White action surfaces, Ink borders, Green/Violet selection treatment, strong labels, two-layer focus, touch targets and restrained corners repeat Mergora patterns.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Selection mode and descriptions are independent; selection mode owns all listbox roles, state and arrow behavior as one coherent opt-in.

api.enableWhen: selectionMode or showDescriptions is explicitly true.

disabledBehavior.ui: No description text or selected treatment is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Native action buttons retain normal Tab behavior; arrows are not intercepted.
disabledBehavior.events: No selection callback or state update runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No listbox, option, aria-selected, description, or roving-tabindex output enters the tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Focused browser and unit evidence covers listbox roles, selected state, arrow focus and enhancement removal; manual AT and localization matrices remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused Storybook browser evidence verifies this item's enhancement isolation and primary semantic or interaction path; the family suite also checks runtime failures, axe, narrow RTL structure, forced colors, reduced motion, and touch where applicable.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Full browser/localization coverage, manual AT, lifecycle and Passport approval remain open.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Distribution and complete interaction/accessibility evidence remains incomplete.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: An ordinary Shadcn link/badge composition does not own stable reference numbering, fail-closed URLs, source detail, or external-link safety.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Stable numbered references fail unsafe URLs closed and can independently expose a readable source detail note.

visualSignature.summary: Compact Violet provenance context, Ink rule, literal-white mapping, explicit warning state, distinctive focus and restrained corners belong to Mergora.

optionalEnhancements.summary: showSourceDetail adds a named source note independently of safe link activation.

disabledBehavior.ui: No source detail note is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Safe citation link and numbering remain unchanged.
disabledBehavior.events: No enhancement event or renderer runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No note or detail text enters the accessibility tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated evidence covers link naming, unsafe no-link behavior, external rel, detail removal and forced colors; manual AT evidence remains open.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused Storybook browser evidence verifies this item's enhancement isolation and primary semantic or interaction path; the family suite also checks runtime failures, axe, narrow RTL structure, forced colors, reduced motion, and touch where applicable.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Security review, supported browsers, manual AT and Passport approval remain open.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Distribution, security and complete manual evidence gates remain incomplete.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: An ordinary Shadcn Collapsible does not establish a provider-neutral process-summary privacy boundary, streaming state, bounded progress, or opt-in completion announcement.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: A native controlled/uncontrolled disclosure stays quiet by default while numeric progress and completion announcement remain separate opt-ins.

visualSignature.summary: A measured Ink disclosure, white Canvas, Green structural line, Violet context text, strong summary, bounded corners and preference fallbacks express Mergora.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Progress display and completion announcement are independent, while the baseline disclosure has no automatic verbosity.

api.enableWhen: progress is an object or announceCompletion is true, independently.

disabledBehavior.ui: No progress rail or completion channel is rendered.
disabledBehavior.events: No completion transition is tracked or announced.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No progress text or live region enters the accessibility tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Native disclosure, exact basic/recommended isolation, a coarse-pointer tap path, direct reduced-motion checks, progress validation, axe, and privacy guidance are covered; current screen-reader verbosity and manual evidence remains incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Controlled/uncontrolled source paths, native disclosure toggles by keyboard and emulated touch, exact enhancement isolation, and direct reduced-motion behavior have browser evidence; completion-transition, cross-browser, real-device, and cancellation matrices remain open.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Privacy review, browsers, manual AT, lifecycle and Passport gates remain open.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Distribution and complete privacy/accessibility evidence remain incomplete.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Shadcn has no ordinary lifecycle primitive for safe tool input/output disclosure, exact redaction, sensitive reveal, cancellation, and retry boundaries.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Provider-neutral status and consumer-owned cancel/retry combine with escaped, redacted, default-hidden sensitive details and controlled reveal.

visualSignature.summary: Ink structure, literal white, text-backed Green/Violet status, readable code surface, distinctive focus, touch targets and restrained corners keep tool state in the family.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Details, sensitive reveal, exact redaction and duration are independently selected; no tool execution is bundled.

api.enableWhen: Each property is explicitly selected independently.

disabledBehavior.ui: No details disclosure, reveal action, or duration is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Status and consumer-owned lifecycle actions remain usable without exposing values.
disabledBehavior.events: No redaction, reveal callback or duration renderer runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No input/output, reveal control, or duration enters the accessibility tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Focused tests cover escaped/redacted/default-hidden output, enhancement removal and semantic status; full manual AT and security evidence is missing.

interactionEvidence.summary: Lifecycle controls and stories exist, but full cancellation/retry, controlled reveal, cross-browser, touch and offline matrices remain open.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Security review, browsers, manual AT, lifecycle and Passport approval remain open.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Distribution, security and complete accessibility evidence remain incomplete.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Shadcn has no ordinary stable-segment streaming text primitive with selectable prior DOM, throttled announcements and reduced-motion cursor behavior.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Stable keyed segments preserve prior selectable DOM while announcement and cursor channels remain independent and off by default.

visualSignature.summary: Plain selectable Ink text uses a restrained Violet state cursor and shared reduced-motion and forced-color mappings without decorative casing.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Debounced polite announcements and the visual cursor are independently opt-in and share no forced state.

api.enableWhen: announceUpdates or showCursor is independently true.

disabledBehavior.ui: No cursor or announcement node is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Stable selectable text segments remain unchanged.
disabledBehavior.events: No timer or announcement formatter runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No live region enters the accessibility tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Stable ids, announcement removal, selectable text and preference CSS have focused evidence; announcement-rate and manual AT review remain missing.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused Storybook browser evidence verifies this item's enhancement isolation and primary semantic or interaction path; the family suite also checks runtime failures, axe, narrow RTL structure, forced colors, reduced motion, and touch where applicable.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: DOM stability, announcement-rate, browsers, manual AT and Passport evidence remain open.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Risk Class 3 distribution and complete streaming/accessibility evidence remain incomplete.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Shadcn has no ordinary comment thread with resolve/reopen ownership, draft control, optimistic failure recovery, and optional mention integration.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Consumer-owned mutations gain optional honest pending/error/retry/discard recovery and separately optional mention suggestions.

visualSignature.summary: A literal-white threaded workbench, Ink separators, Green resolution rail, Violet focus, strong author/time hierarchy, touch targets and bounded corners repeat the family.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Optimistic recovery and mention suggestions are independent and remain consumer-owned.

api.enableWhen: optimisticReplies is true or mentionSuggestions is a supplied collection, independently.

disabledBehavior.ui: No optimistic rows, retry/discard actions, or mention choices are rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Reply and resolve callbacks remain consumer-owned without local mutation simulation.
disabledBehavior.events: No optimistic state transition, retry, discard, or mention selection runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No pending/error recovery or mention controls enter the tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Ordered comments, named forms, visible recovery, enhancement removal and semantic CSS have focused evidence; full manual AT remains missing.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused Storybook browser evidence verifies this item's enhancement isolation and primary semantic or interaction path; the family suite also checks runtime failures, axe, narrow RTL structure, forced colors, reduced motion, and touch where applicable.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Mutation lifecycle, browsers, security, manual AT and Passport approval remain open.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Risk Class 3 distribution, security and complete recovery/accessibility evidence remain incomplete.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: An ordinary Shadcn Avatar composition does not own text-backed available/away/busy/stale/offline semantics or deterministic stale derivation.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Every state is visible text, with independently optional explicit-clock stale derivation and an aggregate activity summary.

visualSignature.summary: Literal-white compact rows, Ink structure, Green and Violet avatar outlines, strong name/status hierarchy, non-color offline style and restrained corners repeat Mergora patterns.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Stale derivation and summary are independent, deterministic and off by default.

api.enableWhen: stalePolicy is supplied or showSummary is true, independently.

disabledBehavior.ui: No summary is rendered and supplied status text is unchanged.
disabledBehavior.behavior: No time calculation or aggregate work runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No derived stale label or aggregate output is added.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Non-color labels, deterministic stale policy, enhancement removal, narrow layout, RTL and forced colors have source/unit evidence; full manual AT remains missing.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused Storybook browser evidence verifies this item's enhancement isolation and primary semantic or interaction path; the family suite also checks runtime failures, axe, narrow RTL structure, forced colors, reduced motion, and touch where applicable.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Real-time/privacy integration review, browsers, manual AT and Passport approval remain open.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Distribution and complete real-time/accessibility/privacy evidence remain incomplete.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: An ordinary Shadcn Table composition does not own immutable audit semantics, large-data windowing, filtering, export scope, or spreadsheet-injection defense.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Actor/action/object/time semantics combine with independently optional filtering, fixed-row virtualization, and consumer-owned spreadsheet-safe CSV export.

visualSignature.summary: A measured literal-white event workbench, Ink borders, Green filter rail, Violet focus, strong definition hierarchy, touch targets and bounded corners identify Mergora.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Filtering, virtualization and CSV export are independent and export uses an explicit consumer callback.

api.enableWhen: Each prop is set independently to a non-false value.

disabledBehavior.ui: No filter form, virtual viewport focus stop, or export action is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: All immutable events render as a normal ordered list.
disabledBehavior.events: No filter state, scroll window, CSV work, or export callback runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No filter controls, virtual position metadata, count output, or export action enters the tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Semantic definition lists, enhancement removal, CSV defense, virtual metadata, responsive CSS and preferences have focused evidence; full Risk Class 3 manual AT is missing.

interactionEvidence.summary: Filtering/export/virtualization source paths and stories exist; large-data performance, cross-browser, touch, cancellation and security/privacy matrices remain open.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Large-data, security/privacy, browsers, manual AT, lifecycle and Passport approval remain open.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Risk Class 3 distribution, performance, security and complete accessibility evidence remain incomplete.
